mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CARTTABLE (CARTNO, CARTPRODUCTID, CARTDATE, CARTUSERID, CARTAMOUNT) VALUES (#{cartno},#{cartproductid},now(),#{cartuserid},#{cartamount})
mapper.select: SELECT c.cartno as cartno, c.cartuserid as cartuserid, p.productno as productno, m.username as username, p.productname as productname, c.amount, p.productprice as productprice, (productprice * cartamount) money FROM MEMBERTABLE m, PRODUCTTABLE p, CARTTABLE c WHERE m.userid = c.cartproductid AND p.productno = c.cartproductid AND c.cartuserid = #{cartuserid} ORDER BY c.productid
